KULUMBUNUNA 
Kwiza  chakulinangula chachihya, echi chinalumuna vilongeselo vyakutanga  
chakalikilamu inemanyina  hauhashi wakunangakana vyuma (competence based 
curriculum)  chinanehe kwalumuka mukulinangula vyuma kuhichila mukuvilinga 
kaha nachilingisa valongi kukwata chinyingi chamumyaka ino mukuzamikisa kupwa 
nachinyingi chakuzata milimo yakumavoko.  
Uno mukanda wavilongeselo vyamwakunangwila vakashikola vali mufwomu 1 
vanausoneka mujila yauhashi wakunangakana vyuma vyanangwilo najishimbi 
jakumona nge kulinangula chinalitoto  nakayoyelo kavathu. Mauhashi akunangakana 
vyuma vanahake mukalikilamu ya 2023  osena analitasana navyuma vyanangwilo 
vanasoneka mumukanda uno  
Mukanada uno unemanyina hakukafwa  milongeshi  vanakunangula seteko yavalongi  
vali mufwomu 1 kunangula vilongeselo vyakalikulumu inemanyina hakunangula 
valongi vyuma vatela kulinga  (competence based curriculum) halwola kunahono 
mikanda vanetavila kuzachisa mumashikola. Echi chili nakusolola kufwila 
chamuthango wafulumende watala vyamashilo kumona ngana ngwavo milimo 
yamulongeshi vanayashiwisa. Hakulinga ngocho, milongeshi vatela kuzachisa 
chinyingi valinacho chakutanga nakuwana vyuma vikwavo navivakafwako 
mukunangula valongi mumaukalu vanahase kuwana mukunangula vilongeselo evi .  
Ngunachifwelela ngwami milongeshi navazachisa mukanda ou mujila yakwoloka.  
 
Kelvin Mambwe (PhD) 
Permanent Secretary- Educational Services 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

4 
 
 
KUSAKWILILA 
Mukanda uno wavilongeselo  vyakutanga Litilicha mu Luvale kuli valongi mu form 1   
vaulongesele kuhichila mukuhulyojola vathu vavavulu  nakuhomesa vathu hamwe. 
Vathu vavavulu hamwe kaha namauka avathu akulisezaseza vavahulishile 
nakuvahana nawa lisesa lyakuhana vishinganyeka vyavo havyuma vyatela 
kusonekewa mumukanda uno. Hakulinga ngocho, ngunahane kusakwilila chami kuli 
vathu vosena, namauka akulisezaseza  ahanyine chinyingi chavo hamwe kaha 
nakukafwa chamali chinahashisa kusoneka naukufwatula mukanda uno wavinangwilo. 
Ava vanapu milongeshi,vakhuluwa vahajizemba, mauka akulihandununa hamwe kaha 
navambwembwa. 
Mukukumisa, ngunasakwilila kulihana chavakakuza vakuchihanda chatala vilongeselo 
vyakutanga mumashikola cha Directorate of Curriculum Developmen hakuzata 
nakumona ngana ngwavo mulimo wakosoneka mukanda wakunangula vakashikola 
unazachiwa mujila yamwenemwene 
 
Charles Ndakala, (Dr.) 
Director – Curriculum Development 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

9 
 
KUJIMBULA 
Mukanda uno wavilongeselo vyakunangula va fwomu 1  vanausoneka mangana ukafweko 
milongeshi mukunangula valongi vinangwilo vya Luvale. Mukalikilamu vanalumuna.  Uno 
mukanda wavinangwilo  vanausoneka managana uzachiwe mukwashiwisa kunangula valongi  
vatete navaputuka  kulinangula vilongeselo vya 2023 kalikilamu shimbu kanda  kupwenga  
kulongesa nakusonejeka  mikanda  ivene  vatela kuzachisa mukutanga nakutangisa. 
Mukutwalililaho, uno mukada uli nakusolola kufwila nakulihana chafulumende kuhichila 
kumuthango watala vyamashikola mukuputuka  kunangula vyakwalumuka chakutanga 
kalikilamu ya 2023 nawa inamono ngana ngwayo vyuma vanasoneka mumukanda uno 
vinatemo mukunangula valongi vyuma navalinangula nakuzata namavoko avo kweseka 
naseteko yakunangakana chalwola tunahetemo. 
Numba tuhu uno mukanda vanaukupwisa nakuzamikisa vyuma vyakunangula valongi, 
milongeshi vatela kuzachisa chinyingi nauhashi wakutanga chavo nakumona ngana ngwavo 
vali nakuhakilako vyuma vikwaavo vinahase kuzamikisa kutanga chavalongi chikumanyi 
haze vanamono ngana ngwavo hali liphwata. Kuhakilako nawa,  milongeshi vanahase 
kwalumuna milimo chipwe vyuma navalinga valongi  vili mumukanda uno kweseka nakupwa 
chashikola  nashikola vali nakutangilamo valongi. 
Vilongeselo vyosena vili mumukanda uno vanavijinyina mukumona ngana ngwavo valongi 
vali nakulinangula vyuma navalinga namavoko avo anakuzamikisa nawa kujiminyina 
muvishinganyeka kaha nawa nakumona ngana nge khala  chihela  chipwe shikola valiho 
valongi  vanahase kulinangula mujila yamwenemwene. Echi kuvwovuwa khana 
chinemanyinana hakuhana uswa wakutanga  nakunganyala chakalikiilamu yakukupuka                       
kuli khala longi chakuzeneka kutala okwo afuma chipwe omu apwa. 
Hilufwelelo lwakumona nge mukanda ou  navinangwilo vilimo vavimone kulema  kupwa 
vyuma navikafwa milongeshi kunangula  valongi chinyingi, uhashi nalilimi lyaLuvale  
navilinga vyamwenemwene mukulinangula chakukupuka. 
MWAKUZACHISHILA MUKANDA 
Mukanda  ou unahane vyuma vize navatangisa muthemu 2 mu fwomu 1. Vanaupange 
mumitwe yavihande kaha mutwe wachihande uli navyuma vyakulihandununa 
vyakufwana nge kuhanjika na kwivwilila, kutanga chakujimina na kusoneka. Vyuma 
vili  omu mumukanda kavyeshi vilongeseloko oloze vyakuzachisa kusoneka 
vilongeselo.Hakuwahisa  vilongeselo watela kufumisa vihanda vya mutwe

10 
 
wachihande kuvyuma vyakulisezaseza. Chinjikizo, mutwe wachihande watela kupwa 
kuhanjika na kwivwilila, mazu, kutanga na kusoneka. Omu nauwahisa mutwe 
wachihande watela kusakula vyuma vyakunangula namilimo oyo vatela  kuzata 
nauhashi 
wakunangakana. 
Shikaho 
mutwe 
wachihande 
naupwa 
nauhashi 
wakunangakana vyuma vyavivulu.Ngocho, watela kusakula chuma echi nachimbata 
lwola lwalunene muchihande chove. Kuhakilako nawa, milimo vanakuhane 
mumukandavene ou kawatela kuyikumisa muchihande chimweko. Evi vanahase 
kuvikilikita muvilongeselo vyakulihandununa  handununa. 
MWAKUNANGWILA 
Hakunangula, mutwe wachihande watela kukavangiza jijila jakutangiwiilamo. Echi 
nachikukafwa kutangisa chinangwilo hichinangwilo vanale.

CHIHANDE CHIVENE 1: VIHANDE VYAVILEMU MULIFUCHI 
Kwaula : Chihande chivene echi nacheulula valongi havihande vyavilemu kulifuchi lya 
Zambia kuhichila muvihanda vitanu evi; kwivwilila nakuhanjika, kutanga, kusoneka, 
mwaya lilimi nakwalumuna mujimbu. 
Uhashi Wakunangakana Vyuma:  Chihande chivene echi nachikafwa nakunangula 
valongi vapwenga vakalifuchi vamwenemwene kuhichila mukuthachikiza vihande 
vyavilemu vyalifuchi lya Zambia.  
KWIVWILILA NAKUHANJIKA 
Chihande: Shimutwilo 
Mutwe Wachihande: Chivwasano   
Kujimbula: Chihande echi nacheulula valongi mwakushimutwila navakwavo.  
Uhashi wakunangakana:  Zachisa lilimi lyakwoloka kushimutwila havihande 
vyakusefuka mujingalila (vihande vyavilemu mulifuchi). 
Kasangumwiso: Hula valongi vavali valivwasane nge umwe ali nakulanjisa chola 
chenyi mukwavo nawa ali nakutonda kuchilanda.  
Mulimo Watete 
Kushimutwila hachihande chakusefuka mujingalila (vihande vyavilemu mulifuchi).

mulifuchi).

KUSAKULA CHAKUKUPUKA 
Mukumbi apwile kanyike wamangana chikuma mushikola yenyi. Kakavulu 
nou ahashilenga kumukotongola mujindongi jose wauchi. Kakoma ikhiye 
amusezelenga mundongi ya Makumi. Vamufwelelele chikuma kuli valongeshi jenyi 
kaha valongi nawa vamwivwilenga kuwaha chikuma.

20 
 
Likumbi limwe shimbu kanda vaputuke kusoneka esekelo yamango 7, 
Mukumbi 
apwile 
nakufuma 
kushikola 
yavo 
himwaya 
kuzuvo jakusavala. 
Hakupulasana mukachi kajiofwishi javakulwane vashikola, amwene lipepa mumavu. 
Hakupwa kanyike azangilenga vyakutangatanga chikuma, anonele lize lipepa 
mangana atange ovyo vanasonekaho. Kushishika ngana, amwene lipepa lyamakumi 
lize vapwile nakusoneka likumbi eli nalichako!  
Muchima wa Mukumbi waputukile kululuta namayena mujimba wose metu. 
“Nge nangushishikamo kanawa mulipepa omu, yami kunahu ngwahase lyehi cheseko 
echi” ashinganyekele. Vishinganyeka vyenyi vyaputukile kulipika vivene. Mazu avali 
aputukile kumuhanjikisa muthulo yenyi. Limwe lyamulwezele kumbata lipepa lize 
nakuya nakulitanga. Likwavo lyamulwezele kumbata lize lipepa nakulitwala kuli 
mulongeshi chakuzeneka kutanga vihula. Kusongo, Mukumbi asakwile kutwala lipepa 
lize kuli mulongeshi chakuzeneka kutangamo. “Lipepa lya Makumi eli vamulongeshi, 
ngwaliwane muchikolo chaofwishi yenu,“ alwezele mulongeshi. Mulongeshi 
asuulukile nenyi chikuma kaha amusangejekele nakumwalisa.  
Lyacheleko, Mukumbi asonekele esekelo ya Makumi. Esekelo khana yapwile 
yayikalu chikuma. Chipwe yakaluhwile, esekeleko kukumbulula kuzachisa chinyingi 
chenyi. Kusongo, awanyine sambiso  60 ku 100. Chipwe kawanyine jisambiso jajivulu 
chikumako, Mukumbi apwile muthu wakusuuluka mwomwo jisambiso awanyine 
japwile jakuliwanyina namangana enyi.  
Kufuma likumbi lize, Mukumbi vamuthachikijile kupwa kanyike wamuchano 
chikuma. Muchano wenyi wamuhanyine kalemesa kuvathu vose mukuyoya chenyi 
chosena.  
Seteko Yakunangakana: Mikanda yakulihandununa yaseteko yavo vanayitange 
nakuyivwishisa mujila yakwoloka.

ULEMU WASHINGO 
Kwapwile vakweze vavali valizangile chikuma, majina avo Vashingo na Livoko. 
Livoko apwile Lihando wakulinga tuhu nahameso wii. Shingo apwile mukakuta ishi. 
Apwile naphuwenyi navana venyi. Shikaho ngocho Shingo akatukile nakuya kuli 
mukwavo Livoko mangana ngwenyi, akamukafweko vyakulya ayoyese thanga yenyi, 
oloze Livoko akanyine ngwenyi, “Chuma muka wahona kulikwachisa, vakwenu vali 
nakulikwachisa nyi yove?  Ngunakane kukuhana vyakulya’’. Kaha ohovene Shingo 
akatukile nakuya kwimbo lyenyi. Lwola lwalivaji lwahetele ngocho Shingo akatukile 
nakuya nakuta vayishi navakwavo vanduyi. Shingo awanyine njeke imwe yavaishi 
vakwavo vawanyine jinjeke jajivulu javaishi.  
Hakuheta kwimbo, Shingo aswekele ize njeke yayishi mukasongwa.Oloze 
vakwavo valandulwile vaze vaishi javo. Ngonde yalisolo yahetele, Shingo ngwenyi 
akwate kunjeke yenyi, mama, kuwana vinyundu vanali vaze vaishi. Ngocho Shingo 
aputukile kunyungulula uze ungwe wavaishi atwale kumbongi nakulandulula. 
Hakuheta kuze vathu vosena vali namama! Olunga khana hamo nazaluka nyi anehe 
vayishi vakufukiwa ngana. Vathu vahonene kulanda vaze vayishi .Shikaho 
vishinganyeka vikwavo muli ikhiye vyejile nge atwale vaze vayishi nakutambasana na 
chivwale chipwe lupa. Zala ngana kwijiva ukalu. Kaha kwejile mukweze umwe 
amuhulishile ngwenyi, nge mwahasa kutambasana kawa nauze ungwe wavayishi. 
Shingo alingile ngocho, uze mwenya kawa alwezele Shingo nge lijina lyauze kawa 
ikhiye vyavivulu.Nge musaka kumusanyika muvuluke ngove Vyavivulu. 
Shikaho Shingo nayikhiye akatukile nakuya kwimbo lyenyi, kuheta kuze 
phuwenyi helwa ngwenyi yovenyi kumana kaweshi ulungako. Wayile watusele 
nazala, oloze uneza nakawa, shikaho ou kawa kove yikhiye natukutelekela. Shingo 
aholele kaha khulu.Vana venyi vaputukile kulila zala. Shingo ambachile kawa kenyi 
nakuya muchipapa nakuhanga tunyama. Omu alingile washa kwakamwihi 
namusumba, kuwana kachi tunyama ovoko. Vyavivulu aputukile kukwata nakujiha

37 
 
vaze tunyama.Hakuhiluka kwimbo phuwenyi navana venyi vevwile kuwaha chikuma 
kaha vayoyele kuzala. Vaputukile jino kulajisako imwe. Shingo atwalilileho kuya 
nakujiha tunyama. 
Livoko vikumba vyenyi vyaputukile kukuma kaha ayile kuli mukwavo 
mangana amukafweko kawa kenyi, Shingo amulwezele ngwenyi, kuvanga kufweta 
shimbu naumbata ou kawa kaha nawa kumusanyika ngwove vyavivulu. Livoko 
afwetele Shingo. Kaha ambachile uze kawa nakuya nenyi. Livoko ayile nayikhiye 
nakuhanga tunyama muchipapa. Uze kawa aputukile kukwata tunyama, ikhye Livoko 
naliulako. Akalinge ngana kwijiva uze kawa nalihichi lyehi. Aputukile kumusanyika 
oloze kahilukile chekako. Shikaho Livoko ambachile nyama yenyi nakuya kwimbo. 
Omu ahetele kuze, ashinganyekele kuya kuli Shingo akalikonekele hakujimbalisa uze 
kawa. Shingo akanyine ngwenyi, kawa kove najimbala ami wami kwali ikhiye 
vyavivulu. 
Shikaho Livoko akatukile nakuya kuzuvo yenyi anonele jimbongo jajivulu 
nakuhana kuli Shingo. Shingo amulwezele nge kawa kenyi yikhiye vyavivulu. Livoko 
cheka ayile nakumbata upite ukwavo nakunehela Shingo. Shingo amulwezele 
mwomumwe nge natondo kaha kawa kenyi. Livoko ambachile phuwenyi, vanavenyi 
navangamba jenyi vosena, kukumisako nayikhiye vene alitwalile kuli Shingo. Shikaho 
Shingo jinonyi apwile lihando wamunene.Hakhiko hafuma Livoko kuputuka kuzachila 
Shingo. Livoko jino apwa ngamba yambala ya Shingo, muwana livoko ngukule 
himwakula Shingo.

MUJIMBU 
         Hamyaka chikuma kwapwilenga chinyanga chavambwanda, azangilenga 
chikuma kulya nyama yavambwanda. Vakwavo vosena vesekele kumweululako nge 
wapwa mulonga kujihajiha tunyama vamumusenge ikhiye kwivwako chiku.  Ikhiye 
nawa kapwilenga nakulanjisako vakwavoko shina kulya ivene kaha. 
          Likumbi limwe kashinakaji wahembo lyavo ejile kuli uze chinyanga kuwana 
nakatuka lyehi hikuya nakuta vambwanda. Amuhulile ngwenyi “Muzukulu lyami uli 
nakuya kulihi?” Chinyanga amukumbulwile ngwenyi  “Wino kawamwene nyi likishi, 
nguna kuya kuute wami nakwoza.” Lelonyi kuvanga vene mbwanda uze wamunene, 
uze kashinakaji kasuulukileko amukumbulwile jino ngwenyi kujiha jiha likha tunyama 
ngana kacheshi chuma chamwazako, yami Sachiteta hundu vinatoko mumeso ami 
vyavivulu. Valuvale nawa ngwavo zomboka mungowa mukanwa kamukwenu muthu 
kaveshi kuzombokamoko.  Uze chinyanga hakwivwa ngocho apihilile chikuma 
ngwenyi khaka ulina lwiso mwomwo kandalyehi ngukuhaneko. Mbata chitwamo 
utwame musenge unguvandamine ngukwozele jino mbwanda wamunene. 
             Mwahichile lwola lwalundende uze chinyanga ejile nambwanda yenyi 
wamunene khaka tona! khaka tona!, nakwachila uze mbwanda kumatwitwi oku 
anakuhanjika ngwenyi kechi kwecha unyangakhanako. Ngwenyi ambate phoko husu 
ize phoko kwiza hachikamba chalihinji lyenyi kipu yapwilenawa phoko yakuvambuka 
miteto jino salu mame-e-e! uze mbwanda nawa pisunuku mbushi thwa! thwa! thwa! 
muviputa nyiki tala jino miteto yambwende kuli chinyanga. Uze khaka yenyi miselo 
nguu,  ngwenyi tala litwamine kaha ou unyanga khana  nge uli namangana kufuma 
kulelo wechenga kwenyeka tunyama.

KUTANGILA HAPEHO CHAMWAZA KUHAMBAKANA KUTANGILA MUSHIKOLA 
Kutanga jino chalumuka mwomwo ya thekinolonji. Valongi vamwe jino 
vanakutangila hapeho kechi nge mushikolako nge muze chapwile mwaya chisemwa 
chakutanga. Kaha jino jila mukaze yambwende hali eji jijila jivali? Tuyenu tushishike 
hajijila josena jivali. 
Kutangila hapeho: 
Kutangila hapeho chapwa chamwaza mwomwo valongi vanahase kutanga 
khala lwola vanazange, kaha nawa cheji kukafwa vaze vali nakulinga vyuma vikwavo. 
Ithaneti nawa ili naunjiho wawuvulu nauhasa kukafwa valongi kwivwishisa 
vyuma vanatange nakuwana unjiho wavyuma vyavivulu namivwimbimbi yavyuma 
vize kanda vamone navahasa kuviwana. 
Kutangila kuzuvo nawa hichuma chimwe chamwaza chikuma kuhambakana 
kuhitangana hikuya kushikola, kaha nawa chinahase kupwa chamwaza chikuma nge 
longi naviji keshi kuhona kutangako oloze mwalitangila kwenyi oku ali muzuvo 
chakuhona kusalila munyima. 
Kutangila Mushikola: 
Kulimona namilongeshi meso nameso navakwenu vakashikola nawa chapwa 
chuma chachilemu chikuma mwomwo namuhasa kulihujola umwe namukwavo 
mukulinga ngocho longi mwapwa muthu wakuhanjika nakulamuna nakuhasa 
kulimanyina mukulihakwila mukuhanjika. 
Jishikola jili nakukanda vana vaze vamanya nakuvalingisa vapwenga vathu 
vambwende muchitungilo, kaha nawa kakweshi vyuma vyakuvaluwanganyisako

PUHO YA KALIFWO NA KASONGO 
Kalifwo hamakumbi enyi aukweze omu alingile nahono lyehi shikola, apwile 
nakushinganyeka mwakuyoyela. Likumbi limwe atwamine nasongo yenyi Kasongo 
nakushimutwila. Muze vene mukushimutwila chavo vawanyine nge kwimba myaso 
nawa chatwama namali amavulu. Kasongo hakwanuka changocho amulwezele 
yayenyi mwakuputukila kwimbilamo myaso. Kalifwo amulwezele ngwenyi kwimba 
natwimba oloze twatela kuwana myaso muka oyo navevwa nayo vathu kuwaha 
mwomwo nge natwijila kwimba chimbila vathu navatuseha ngwavo ava vana 
vanazaluka. 
Mwahichile makumbi amandende kaha vakwenu vanyike navize vinoma 
vyavo komomo. Visaji vyajingita, makembe namiyachi ikwavo yakulisezaseza.  
Hakulinga vyosena vinasu, Kasongo ambile ngwenyi kumana twimbinga myaso 
yachisemwa nge muze vembilenga va Nyakanengu. Oloze yayenyi akanyine ngwenyi 
myaso yachisemwa vakweze vamakumbi ano kaveshi kuyivwa kuwahako. Hakulinga 
ngocho, songo yenyi ononokele hamazu ayayenyi nakuputuka kulilongesa kwimba 
myaso yamakumbi ano yavyuma vili nakusoloka. 
Hakufuka chamyaso yavo vathu vavavulu vavasanyikilenga kuvilika 
vyapwilengako. Ava vakweze vavulukilenga jino ngwavo ‘’vasamwimbila vembila

87 
 
vathu kuvula.’ Vayile puho yayinene kaha mali kuli vakhiko alisalile nakuwana nge 
khumana kwimba chatwama namali amavulu. Kaha nawa mwatwama kulijiva 
navathu vavavulu.

Kuhaka hamavoko: (kusapuluka)
